text: Our consumer hardware division (smart home devices) has generated $180M revenue but negative $12M EBITDA for three consecutive years. Market share has declined from 8% to 4.5% as Amazon and Google have undercut on price. We have 340 employees in the division, including 85 firmware engineers whose skills are transferable to our profitable IoT enterprise segment. A private equity firm has offered to acquire the division for $95M (0.53x revenue), retaining all staff with 18-month employment guarantees. Alternatively, we could wind down over 12 months, salvaging IP and redeploying engineers internally, with estimated restructuring costs of $35M. The division holds 47 patents, 12 of which are cited in competitor products.
